query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A person wearing an orange top and light blue pants captured in motion against a background of green grass and dark horizontal rails. The figure appears to be running or moving quickly from left to right. A watermark in the bottom right corner reads "glad2badad.dpchallenge.com".
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing an orange top and light blue pants captured with heavy motion blur, creating streaked, ghosted layers of the figure against a horizontally smeared background of green grass and dark rails. The intentional blur transforms the running figure into an abstract ribbon of color, with multiple overlapping exposures of the body visible. A watermark in the bottom right corner reads "glad2badad.dpchallenge.com".
